global.title: Electrek Formula Sun Grand Prix 2026: Day 1 results and gallery
global.summary: That’s a wrap on day 1 of the Electrek Formula Sun Grand Prix (FSGP) 2026! For the first time, FSGP is running at Brainerd International Raceway in Brainerd, Minnesota, a 3.1-mile road course better known for racing cars of the gas kind…until this week.

global.title: GM just added ChargePoint to its EV apps
global.summary: GM EV drivers can now find, start, and pay for charging at ChargePoint stations without leaving their EV brand’s app.

global.title: Kia PV5 High Roof spotted in public for the first time [Video]
global.summary: Kia is gearing up to launch several new PV5 electric van variants, including a High Roof model. Spotted driving in public, the PV5 High Roof looks considerably bigger than the standard model.

global.title: NHTSA targets Tesla’s ‘Radar Saves Us’ document in FSD crash probe
global.summary: NHTSA is now demanding a Tesla internal document titled “Radar Saves Us” as part of its investigation into “Full Self-Driving” crashes in low-visibility conditions. The request is buried in a new 24-part information demand sent to Tesla on July 2, and it points the probe straight at the decision tha

global.title: Idaho just switched on a big solar farm – and a much larger one is next
global.summary: Idaho just brought a 125-megawatt (MWac) solar farm online – and construction has begun on another one more than three times its size.

global.title: Tesla (TSLA) Q2 2026 earnings preview: strong deliveries, murky profits
global.summary: Tesla reports its second-quarter 2026 financial results tomorrow, July 22, after the market closes, with the earnings call to follow at 5:30 p.m. ET. The setup is different this time. Tesla just posted its best-ever second quarter on deliveries, so now Wall Street wants to know whether all those car

global.title: Electra to build $850M Ohio factory for EL9 hybrid-electric plane
global.summary: Electra is putting $850 million into its first aircraft factory, and it picked Springfield, Ohio to build the EL9 Ultra Short, its nine-passenger hybrid-electric plane that can take off in as little as 150 feet. The plant will eventually build up to 800 aircraft a year and create nearly 2,000 jobs,

global.title: Roborock RockMaw X120H LiDAR AWD robot mower $699 off launch, Bluetti Member Day power station sale, Velotric e-bikes, more
global.summary: Leading today’s Green Deals is the launch deal on roborock’s new RockMow X120H LiDAR AWD Robot Lawn Mower for $699 savings. Right behind that, we have Bluetti’s short-term July Member Day Sale event with exclusive discounts on power stations, batteries, solar panels, and more – all starting from $18

global.title: Chevy and Cadillac essentially have no new EVs planned as GM shifts back to gas
global.summary: Chevrolet is the second most popular EV brand in the US behind Tesla, while Cadillac carved out a market in the luxury space. With essentially zero new or updated EVs now planned over the next few years, GM is leaving the door wide open for rivals to take the lead.

global.title: Cyclist deaths are at a 40 year high. The feds want to kill more AND worsen traffic.
global.summary: The Department of Transportation has removed bike lanes from its list of proven safety measure, among other changes which will worsen traffic congestion. The changes seem focused on making roads less safe for bicycles, when cyclist deaths are already near all time highs.
